svg.text: Voxelized screening visualization | 2.5D isometric view | plan-view x-y field extruded through water depth for display
Case: baseline_rectangular_basin | Flow: 0.85 m3/s | Grid: 80 x 24 | Transparent water voxels are run-normalized speed bands, not literal 3D cells
- This is a 2.5D presentation of the current plan-view screening field.
- Water depth is shown as a uniform extrusion for readability. This is not a full 3D solve.
- Solid gray prisms show full-depth solid baffles where present.
- This is best used for comparing screening-flow pattern changes between v0.1 cases.
